productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Zeitfrei Slide Sc Blue Sandals
description: Designed with a sporty look, these adidas Zeitfrei slides are absolutely comfortable and stylish. With quick drying properties, these slides make for great footwear even in wet conditions. Slide into them and flaunt your feet with pride. Upper Wide forefoot strap made of synthetic leather with a fabric lining for comfort and durability Adjustable strap for a customized Fit Grooves on the strap with branding for style Supercloud soft quick-drying sport footbed with quick drying properties for absolute all-day comfort Diamond shaped grooves on the footbed for easy draining away of water Outsole Injected EVA outsole for lightweight comfort Diagonal grooves in a woven pattern for absolute grip and traction even on wet surfaces Slide care Wipe dust with a damp, clean cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
